summary: Comprehensive testing of SeknuTo.cz voucher system and Stripe deposit features. All new features tested and working correctly: voucher landing page with confetti animation, voucher claim flow, Stripe deposit payment integration, and booking form navigation.

issues: Email popup (EmailPopup component) appears on top of voucher popup initially - minor UX issue, user can close it

passed_tests: Backend API health check - GET /api/ returns status:running
GET /api/vouchers/TESTPOUKAZ returns valid voucher with is_valid=true
GET /api/vouchers/TESTPOUKAZ returns correct discount_type='percentage', discount_value=20
GET /api/vouchers/TESTPOUKAZ returns display_discount='20 %', has_expiration=true
GET /api/vouchers/INVALIDCODE returns 404
POST /api/vouchers/TESTPOUKAZ/claim returns redirect_url='/rezervace?voucher=TESTPOUKAZ&auto_apply=true'
POST /api/vouchers/INVALIDCODE/claim returns 404
POST /api/payments/deposit/create returns Stripe checkout URL starting with 'https://checkout.stripe.com'
POST /api/payments/deposit/create returns session_id starting with 'cs_test_'
GET /api/payments/deposit/status/:session_id returns status and payment_status
POST /api/bookings with voucher code works correctly
Price calculation endpoint works correctly (100m² × 2 Kč = 200 Kč)
App.js has /poukaz/:code route properly configured at line 35
VoucherPage loads at /poukaz/TESTPOUKAZ
VoucherPage shows confetti animation
VoucherPage popup shows 'Gratulujeme!' headline
VoucherPage popup shows 'Získáváte' + '20 %' discount info
VoucherPage popup shows 'sleva na celou objednávku' description
VoucherPage popup shows countdown with hours/minutes/seconds
VoucherPage popup shows 'Nabídka platí do: 31.12.2026 23:59'
VoucherPage CTA button 'Uplatnit poukaz a objednat' clicks and redirects to booking
After voucher claim, URL is /rezervace?voucher=TESTPOUKAZ&auto_apply=true
Toast notification 'Poukaz aktivován! Sleva 20%' shows on booking page
Booking page step 1-4 navigation works correctly
Step 1: Service selection with collapsible sections works
Step 2: Property details and price calculation works
Step 3: Calendar date selection works
Step 4: Contact form displays all fields
Step 4: Deposit info box shows 'Záloha 50 Kč kartou'
Step 4: Deposit info box shows 'Zamezuje falešným objednávkám. Odečte se z finální ceny.'
Step 4: Submit button shows 'Zaplatit zálohu 50 Kč' with CreditCard icon
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_voucher_and_payment.py - Created new test file for voucher and payment endpoints
context_for_next_testing_agent: All voucher system features verified working. Voucher landing page at /poukaz/:code displays celebratory popup with confetti, discount info, countdown timer, and CTA button. Stripe deposit payment integration working - creates checkout sessions with test key sk_test_emergent. Booking form properly shows deposit info and 'Zaplatit zálohu 50 Kč' button on step 4. Note: EmailPopup component appears initially over voucher popup but can be closed - minor UX consideration.

mocked_apis.stripe: Using Stripe test mode with sk_test_emergent key - real Stripe integration (NOT MOCKED)
